rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway, that's a full win. Pink jockstrap at Balmoral Friday, change room, active choice again — two weeks running on that one. Apollo ring and necklace stayed home because of pool nerves and 'reads as obviously gay' — they got that round, and you named it clean. Poncho's still on at Balmoral, but the choices underneath it keep getting braver.
pattern: They're loudest when the audience is people who know what he does for a living — work, swim group, anyone who might clock 'obviously gay' and connect it to him.
